proof_summary.route_gate_verdict_source: The route verdict is computed from target_shape, candidate_tactic_ids, allowed_tactic_ids, tactic portfolio known/available status, and shape preference ordering.
proof_summary.real_good_pass: The fixture and exported bundle tests assert pass status, real Ring2 routing refs, copied source artifacts, digest matches, and body-in-receipt exclusion.
proof_summary.real_bad_mutation_reject: The mutation test changes real exported route inputs and asserts blocked status, integrity/error codes, and expectation failure.
proof_summary.input_perturbation_moves_verdict: Changing target_shape moves computed_selected_tactic_id from original_tactic to fallback_tactic; changing tactic availability rejects the original tactic and moves selection to fallback_tactic.

source_evidence.claim: Tactic decisions reject unprobed, unavailable, and shape-inadmissible tactics, then compute selected tactic through target-shape preference and fallback evidence before emitting integrity findings.
Tests cover real-good pass, exported bundle pass, mutation rejection, and target-shape/availability perturbations that move the computed route verdict.

mutation_verdict.reason: The claimed source and tests already prove the requested route/gate evidence contract.
